# Nexa AI Solutions

> Custom Microsoft Office 365 add-ins and Google Workspace add-ons for Excel, Outlook, Word, PowerPoint, Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Gmail.

Nexa AI Solutions builds Office.js and Apps Script applications with Microsoft Graph integrations, enterprise deployment, and fixed-scope delivery.

## Primary services

- /excel-add-in — Excel add-in development (Office.js, custom functions, API dashboards)
- /outlook-add-in — Outlook add-in development (task panes, CRM, email automation)
- /word-add-in — Word add-in development (document automation, templates, AI drafting)
- /powerpoint-add-in — PowerPoint add-in development (slide automation, branded decks)
- /google-docs-add-on — Google Docs add-on development
- /google-sheets-add-on — Google Sheets add-on development
- /google-slides-add-on — Google Slides add-on development
- /gmail-add-on — Gmail add-on development
- /services — All Office & Google add-in services

## Company & trust

- /about — About Nexa AI Solutions (6+ years, Office 365 & Google Workspace focus)
- /work — Portfolio of 80+ add-in case studies with screenshots
- /reviews — Client reviews from Fiverr and Upwork projects
- /pricing — Discovery, Build, and Scale packages
- /enterprise — Enterprise add-in programs
- /how-we-work — Delivery methodology
- /consultation — Free consultation booking
